summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Payment Processing Pricing page at /payment-processing-pricing completed. All 20 requested features passed including all 13 sections, SEO meta tags, FAQ JSON-LD schema with 5 questions, FAQ expand/collapse, internal links, Contact Sales modal with LeadConnector form, and close modal functionality.

issues: Page has 2 meta descriptions (default site-wide + page-specific). The page-specific one is present but may need index.html default removed to avoid duplicate meta tags.

passed: Page loads at /payment-processing-pricing with HTTP 200
H1 text reads 'Transparent Payment Processing Pricing'
SEO: Page title contains 'Payment Processing Pricing Explained | Interchange Plus, Flat Rate & Dual Pricing'
SEO: Meta keywords present with payment processing pricing related terms
SEO: Canonical URL set to /payment-processing-pricing
SEO: FAQ JSON-LD schema present with @type FAQPage and 5 questions
Hero section has 'Contact Sales' button (data-testid='hero-contact-btn')
Hero section has 'Book a 30-Minute Consultation' button (data-testid='hero-book-btn')
Trust line shows 'Transparent Pricing', 'No One-Size-Fits-All Model', 'Flexible Payment Programs'
Section 2: 'Why Payment Processing Is Not One-Size-Fits-All' heading exists
Section 3: 'Understanding Credit Card Processing Fees' heading with 3 fee type cards (Interchange, Card Network, Processor)
Section 4: 'Our Payment Processing Pricing Programs' heading exists
Section 5: 'Interchange Plus Pricing' heading with 4-item benefits checklist
Section 6: 'Flat Rate Pricing' heading with 4-item benefits checklist
Section 7: 'Dual Pricing / Cash Discount Program' heading with benefits checklist and link to dual pricing page
Section 8: 'Choosing the Right Payment Processing Program' heading with 4 factor cards and 3 recommendation boxes
Section 9: 'Payment Processing by Industry' heading with 7 industry links
Section 10: 'Why Businesses Choose Merchant Solutions' heading with 5 benefit checkmarks
Section 11: FAQ section with 5 questions that expand/collapse on click
Section 12: Final CTA 'Find the Best Payment Processing Program for Your Business' heading with both buttons
Internal links section shows links to POS Systems Overview, Payment Terminals, Restaurant POS, QR Mobile Ordering, Self-Ordering Kiosk
Contact Sales button opens LeadConnector form modal with iframe
Close modal button (data-testid='close-form-modal') works to dismiss the form

critical_code_review_comments: PaymentProcessingPricing.jsx well-structured with 504 lines and proper component organization
FAQ JSON-LD schema correctly formatted with all 5 questions matching visible FAQ section
Calendly integration properly loads CSS and JS dynamically on mount
FAQItem component uses proper schema.org microdata (itemScope, itemProp) for rich snippets
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for robust testing
Internal links use React Router Link components for SPA navigation
Modal implementation with backdrop blur and click-outside-to-close functionality
LeadConnector form loaded via iframe as expected
seed_data_creation: N/A - static content page with no API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment Processing Pricing page at /payment-processing-pricing fully tested. All 13 sections present with correct headings, content structure, and interactive elements. SEO features verified: title, meta description, keywords, canonical URL, and FAQ JSON-LD schema with 5 questions. FAQ expand/collapse works. Contact Sales modal opens LeadConnector iframe form and closes properly. Calendly integration for 'Book a 30-Minute Consultation' button working. All data-testid attributes present for testing. Minor note: duplicate meta description tags exist (site default + page-specific) but page-specific one is present.
